subject: LU-6673 ptlrpc: Forbid too early NRS policy tunings

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

messages.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Looks good to me.

Patch Set 1:

Build Started https://build.hpdd.intel.com/job/lustre-reviews/32635/

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 
 
https://build.hpdd.intel.com/job/lustre-reviews/32635/ : SUCCESS

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

This fix looks good, though it would be better to have a test that verifies this fix is working, as described in the Jira ticket.

I think a further improvement would be to also block the return of writing to /proc/fs/lustre/ost/OSS/ost_io/nrs_policies until the policy has finished setting up.  However, I'm not sure how easily this is done.

parents.subject: LU-6158 mdt: always shrink_capsule in getxattr_all

commit.subject: LU-6673 ptlrpc: Forbid too early NRS policy tunings
commit.message:
LU-6673 ptlrpc: Forbid too early NRS policy tunings

Wait for a NRS policy to be fully started before allowing
to apply related tunings, so that all fields are properly
initialized.

Add corresponding test to sanityn.

Signed-off-by: Henri Doreau <henri.doreau@cea.fr>
Change-Id: I92df8f55aebd173a26979e9a506c45f985107d8a
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/15104
Tested-by: Jenkins
Reviewed-by: Emoly Liu <emoly.liu@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
